user.title: Zwaailicht P2000
user.description: Live P2000 emergency alerts from zwaailicht.nu. This integration polls the national feed and shows alerts from ambulance, brandweer, politie, and KNRM within a radius of your home location.

data_description.radius_km: Only alerts within this distance from your home location are shown. Alerts outside this radius are ignored.
data_description.significant_only: Filter out routine and low-priority alerts server-side, keeping only significant incidents. Recommended for most users.
data_description.pieken: Pieken are notable multi-unit incidents (e.g. large fires, major accidents). These are high-signal, low-volume alerts that may not have exact coordinates.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll zwaailicht.nu for new alerts, in seconds. Minimum 30 seconds.

init.title: Zwaailicht P2000 Settings
init.description: Adjust how P2000 alerts are filtered and polled.
